titleStmt.title: SII 41.149: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 149. (A.R. No. 148 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya Jaṭāvarman Sundara-pāṇḍya, Year 6 = c. 14th century A.D.

summary.p: The araiyar, pulappar and iḷamāḍam communities of Talaiyūr-nāḍu in Maṇalūr-nāḍu on the south bank gave some charity deed to the temple making a village called Pāpputtuṟai in their nāḍu as dēvadāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭa panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacca
kkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 6vatu puraṭṭātimātam Uṭaiyār tiruve
ñcamāk kūṭal Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkōyil Ātica
ṇṭecura tevakaṉmikaḷukkut teṉkarai maṇalūr
nāṭṭut talaiyūr nāṭṭu Araiyarkaḷ pulapparkaḷ Iḷa
māṭattom piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricā
vatu Innāyaṉārkku tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷ paṭikkum tiru
kkaṇṇappanāyaṉārkku pūcaikkum Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭukku Aṭai
ppāṉa pāpputtuṟai tevartānamāka Innāḷ mutal kaik
koṇṭu Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum Aṉupavikku(m) miṭattu
Ivvūr nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nattamum kuḷamum kuḷapparippu
m naṉcey puṉcey meṉokkiya maram kiṉokkiya kiṇa
ṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum paṟṟi Aṉupavippārākavum I
vvūṟ kaṭamai vaṟkam Uppāyam tiruvācal viṇiyokan tirumukac
campaṭam Ēṟkaṭamai kūṟṟuvari teriyerutukuṟṟa teṇṭam
maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum kaikoṇṭu cantirātitta
varaiyum tevartāṉamākac celvatāka cempiluñ cilaiyi
lum veṭṭi nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇ
ṇik koḷvarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittup piramāṇam paṇ
ṇikkuṭuttom Āticaṇṭecuratēvar kaṉmikaḷukku
ttalaiyūr nāṭṭu Araiyakaḷ pulapparkaḷ Iḷamāṭatto
m Ippaṭikku Ivaitalaiyūr Uruppaṭai Araiyakaḷil
pāṇiperumāṉ coḻaṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya co
ḻakoṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai talaiyūr nāṭ
ṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 41.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
